name: api-compat
description: Workspace-bound sk-rr API keys + /v1/chat/completions + /v1/models over callForUser.
notes: Uses the /mcp proxy pattern (Next /v1/[...path] route → api.apiV1.handle) rather than the Convex httpRouter — no CONVEX_SITE_URL rewrite needed. API-key auth only, never session. v0.1 = non-streaming + pseudo-stream; real streaming + tool passthrough (2.6) + Anthropic /v1/messages (2.7) next.
